---
title: Abel SILLY
description: Professional Webpage
---


## About me

I'm currently a PhD student at [Institut Montpellierain Alexander Grothendieck](https://imag.umontpellier.fr/) working on "*Statistical modelling of RNA degradation mechanisms in plants*" under the supervision of [Alice Cleynen](https://alice.cleynen.fr/) and [Sophie Lebre](https://www.univ-montp3.fr/miap/~lebre/). My main research interests are about developping statistical methods regarding omics data. I strongly value bioinformatics and am also interested in machine learning in general.

## Contact
 - **e-mail**: abel.silly@umontpellier.fr
 - **Office**: 127 in building 9
 - **address**: 9 Rue du Truel, 34090 Montpellier, France

## Newsletter

 - Until July, I'm visiting the [Mathematical Sciences Institute](https://maths.anu.edu.au/) thanks to the [IRL-FAMSI](https://maths.anu.edu.au/research/famsi-irl).
